auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your Memory Palace
auth.mfaDescription: Open your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code to continue.

register.title: Build Your Palace
register.subtitle: Create an account to start preserving memories
register.name: Name
register.confirmationSent: We've sent a confirmation link to your email address. Click the link to activate your Memory Palace.
register.afterConfirming: After confirming, you'll be taken to the shared room.
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
register.agreeTerms: By creating an account, you agree to our

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link
forgotPassword.resetLinkSent: If an account exists with that email, we've sent a password reset link.

onboarding.welcomeDescription: A beautiful place to preserve your most precious memories — photos, videos, stories — in a space as unique as your life.
onboarding.letsSetUp: Let's set up your palace in just a few steps.
onboarding.nameDescription: This is your personal palace — we'd love to greet you by name.
onboarding.chooseGoal: Choose what matters most to you right now.
onboarding.goalPreserveDesc: Keep a lifetime of moments safe and beautiful
onboarding.goalLegacyDesc: Create something lasting for my children and grandchildren
onboarding.goalShareDesc: Bring loved ones together around shared memories
onboarding.goalOrganizeDesc: Finally put all those photos, videos, and stories in order
onboarding.chooseFirstWing: Choose your first wing to explore
onboarding.wingDescription: Your palace has five wings, each for a different chapter of your life. Which one calls to you first?
onboarding.wingDescriptionShort: Each wing holds a different chapter of your life. Pick one to start — you can explore them all later.
onboarding.readyQuick: We'll take you straight to your first room. Upload a memory and your palace comes alive.
onboarding.readyDescription: Walk through the corridors, open rooms, and begin filling them with the moments that matter most.
onboarding.navigationDescription: Here's how to explore your palace
onboarding.navigationReassurance: There will be a guided tour once you enter!
onboarding.skipOnboarding: Skip and explore on my own
onboarding.styleChoiceTitle: Which historic period inspires you most?
onboarding.styleRomanDesc: A lavish Roman villa with marble atriums and colonnaded gardens
onboarding.styleRenaissanceDesc: A Medici palazzo with frescoed galleries and grand courtyards

palace.wingAtticDesc: Unassigned memories waiting to find their room

settings.profileDescription: Manage your personal information and account settings.
settings.emailReadonlyNote: Your email address is managed through your login credentials and cannot be changed here.
settings.aboutMePlaceholder: A few words about yourself, your family, or what brings you here...
settings.goalDescription: What matters most to you? You can change this anytime.
settings.profileLoadError: Could not load profile. Please try refreshing the page.
settings.accountDescription: Manage your password and account settings.
settings.changePasswordDesc: We will send a password reset link to your email address.
settings.passwordResetSent: Password reset email sent. Check your inbox.
settings.exportDataDesc: Download all your memories, photos, and stories as a ZIP file.
settings.exportDataComingSoon: Data export is coming soon. We are working on it!
settings.exportZipDesc: Download your data and photos in a single ZIP file
settings.exportZipError: Could not create export. Please try again.
settings.exportZipPartial: {count} photo(s) could not be included. The rest of your data was exported successfully.
settings.dangerDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete your account, all your memories, photos, and stories. Type DELETE below to confirm.
settings.palaceStyleDesc: Change the historic period of your palace architecture.
settings.palaceStyleUpdated: Palace style updated. Reload to see changes.
settings.downloadMyDataDesc: Download a copy of all your data including profile, memories, and settings. Files (photos, videos) can be downloaded separately from your rooms.
settings.exportFailed: Failed to export data. Please try again.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Choose how and when Memory Palace reminds you about your memories.
notifications.browserUnsupported: Your browser does not support push notifications. Try using Chrome, Edge, or Firefox for the full experience.
notifications.permissionDenied: Notifications are blocked by your browser. To enable them, click the lock icon in your address bar and allow notifications for this site, then refresh the page.
notifications.pushDescription: Receive notifications even when the app is closed
notifications.onThisDayDesc: Daily reminder when you have memory anniversaries
notifications.timeCapsuleDesc: Get notified when a time capsule is ready to open
notifications.weeklyDigestDesc: Receive a weekly email with memory anniversaries, upcoming time capsules, and shared room activity
notifications.digestLanguageDesc: Choose the language for your weekly digest email
notifications.infoNote: Push notifications are sent once daily around 9:00 AM. The weekly email digest is sent every Monday morning. Your data is stored securely and only used to deliver the notifications you opt into. You can disable any notification at any time.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.description: Manage your plan and view your usage.
subscription.nearLimitWarning: You are approaching your free plan limits.
subscription.forMoreSpace: for more space and AI features.
subscription.billingConnectError: Could not connect to billing service.
subscription.paymentConnectError: Could not connect to payment service.

connections.title: Connected Accounts
connections.description: Link your cloud storage and photo services to import memories directly into your palace. Your files remain in their original location — we only copy what you choose to import.
connections.disconnectFailed: Failed to disconnect. Please try again.
connections.privacyNote: Privacy note: Memory Palace only accesses your files when you explicitly choose to import them. We never scan, index, or store your cloud files without your direct action. You can disconnect any service at any time.
connections.googlePhotosDesc: Import photos and videos from your Google Photos library.
connections.dropboxDesc: Browse and import files from your Dropbox storage.
connections.onedriveDesc: Access photos and documents from your Microsoft OneDrive.
connections.boxDesc: Import files from your Box cloud storage.
connections.applePhotosDesc: Export from Apple Photos app, then upload via Mass Import.
connections.appleMacSteps: Open the Photos app on your Mac.|Select the photos you would like to import.|Go to File → Export → Export Unmodified Originals.|Save them to a folder on your computer.|Return to Memory Palace and use the Mass Import panel to upload.
connections.appleIphoneSteps: Open the Photos app on your device.|Tap 'Select' and choose the photos you want.|Tap the Share button and choose 'Save to Files'.|Save them to iCloud Drive or another accessible location.|On your computer, open Memory Palace and use Mass Import to upload.
connections.appleIcloudSteps: Visit icloud.com/photos in your web browser.|Sign in with your Apple ID.|Select the photos you want to import.|Click the download button to save them to your computer.|Return to Memory Palace and use the Mass Import panel to upload.
connections.disconnectConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to disconnect {provider}? This will revoke access and you will no longer be able to import files from this account.

familySettings.title: Family Sharing
familySettings.description: Create a family group to share your memory palace wings and rooms with loved ones.
familySettings.invitedDescription: You have been invited to join the family group "{name}". Joining will give you access to shared wings and rooms from family members.
familySettings.joinedSuccess: You have joined the family group!
familySettings.createGroupDesc: Start a family group and invite your loved ones. Family members automatically get view access to shared wings and rooms.
familySettings.howItWorksDesc: Family members automatically get view access to wings and rooms you share with the "family" visibility setting. Each member's private memories remain private. Owners and admins can invite or remove members.
familySettings.wingSharingDesc: Share entire wings of your palace with family members
familySettings.inviteToShare: Invite family members to your group above to start sharing wings.
familySettings.confirmUnshare: Are you sure you want to revoke this wing share?
familySettings.confirmRemoveMember: Are you sure you want to remove {email} from the family group?
familySettings.noWingSharesYet: You haven't shared any wings yet. Use the form above to share a wing with a family member.

legacySettings.title: Your Legacy
legacySettings.description: Your memories are precious. Here you can decide who will receive access to your palace and what messages your loved ones will find when the time comes.
legacySettings.introCallout: There is no rush. You can return to these settings any time and update them as your wishes evolve. Everything here is private and encrypted until you choose otherwise.
legacySettings.contactsDesc: These are the people who will receive access to your memory palace. You decide exactly how much they can see.
legacySettings.noContactsDesc: When you are ready, add the people you trust most. They will receive access to your memories when the time comes.
legacySettings.accessLevelDesc: How much of your palace will they be able to see?
legacySettings.accessFullDesc: Access to every wing and room
legacySettings.contactAdded: Legacy contact added. Your loved one will be in safe hands.
legacySettings.fillNameEmail: Please fill in both name and email.
legacySettings.messagesDesc: Write letters to the people who matter most. Your words will be delivered to them with care, exactly when you choose.
legacySettings.noMessagesDesc: Take your time. When you are ready, you can write a personal letter that your loved ones will treasure.
legacySettings.subject: Subject
legacySettings.messagePrompt: Write from the heart. There are no rules here, just your words for someone you love.
legacySettings.deliverDeathAria: Deliver message when the time comes
legacySettings.deliverDateAria: Deliver message on a specific date
legacySettings.messageSaved: Your message has been saved. It will be kept safe.
legacySettings.fillRecipientSubject: Please fill in both recipient and subject.
legacySettings.settingsDesc: These settings determine when and how your legacy plan is activated. Everything stays private until the conditions you set are met.
legacySettings.inactivityDesc: If you have not logged in for this many months, your account will be flagged for legacy transfer. Your trusted verifier will then be contacted to confirm.
legacySettings.inactivityRecommendation: We recommend at least 12 months. You can change this at any time.
legacySettings.trustedVerifierDesc: This person will be contacted to confirm that the legacy transfer should proceed. Choose someone you trust deeply -- a partner, a close family member, or a legal representative.
legacySettings.statusSafe: -- your palace is yours, safe and sound.
legacySettings.confirmRetryDelivery: This will re-send legacy messages to contacts who did not receive them. Continue?
legacySettings.retryFailed: Retry failed. Please try again later.
legacySettings.confirmDeleteContact: Are you sure you want to remove this legacy contact? This cannot be undone.
legacySettings.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this message? This cannot be undone.
legacySettings.noRoomsFound: No rooms found. Create rooms in your palace first.
legacySettings.verifierConfirmedDesc: Your confirmation has been recorded. The legacy transfer has been paused and the account holder's palace remains safe.
legacySettings.verifierExpiredDesc: This verification link has expired. Please ask the account holder to resend the verification email.
legacySettings.verifierInvalidDesc: This verification link is invalid or has already been used. Please check the link and try again.
legacySettings.verifierTooLateDesc: The legacy delivery has already begun and can no longer be cancelled through this link.
legacySettings.verificationExpired: This verification link has expired. Please ask the account holder to resend the verification email.
legacySettings.fetchError: Could not load your legacy settings. Please try again later.
legacySettings.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address (e.g. name@example.com).
legacySettings.invalidVerifierEmail: The verifier email address is not valid. Please check and try again.
legacySettings.onboardingTitle: Get started with your legacy plan
legacySettings.deliverImmediatelyNote: Send this message now, while you can still see it delivered.
legacySettings.confirmDeleteContactSoft: Remove {name} from your legacy contacts? You can always add them again later.
legacySettings.confirmDeleteMessageSoft: Remove this message from your legacy? You can always write a new one.
legacySettings.confirmRetryDeliverySoft: This will re-send legacy messages to contacts who did not receive them. Would you like to continue?
legacySettings.unsavedChangesBody: You have unsaved changes. Switch tabs anyway?
legacySettings.emptyBodyWarning: Your message has no body text — is that intentional?

mfa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
mfa.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account. When enabled, you will need to enter a code from your authenticator app each time you sign in.
mfa.accountProtected: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication.
mfa.disableConfirmDesc: Disabling two-factor authentication will make your account less secure. You can always re-enable it later.
mfa.step1Desc: Open your authenticator app (such as Google Authenticator, Authy, or 1Password) and scan this QR code.
mfa.cantScan: Can't scan? Enter the key manually
mfa.step2Desc: After scanning, your authenticator app will show a 6-digit code. Enter it below to complete setup.
mfa.invalidCode: Invalid code. Please check your authenticator app and try again.
mfa.completeDesc: Your account is now protected with an additional layer of security. You will need your authenticator app each time you sign in.
mfa.backupWarning: Important: Make sure you have a backup of your authenticator app data. If you lose access to your authenticator, you may be locked out of your account.
mfa.qrCodeAlt: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app

import.title: Import from Cloud
import.browseDescription: Browse and select files from your connected accounts
import.noAccountsDesc: Connect your cloud storage or photo services to import memories.
import.importWaitMessage: Please wait while we download and import your selected files. This may take a moment depending on the file sizes.
import.noFiles: No files found in this location.
import.importItemFailed: Could not import {name}. Please try again.

room.maxRoomsReached: Maximum {max} rooms reached for this wing
room.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? Memories inside will be lost.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.modeDescription: Makes text and buttons larger for easier reading

hero.headline: Preserve Your Memories for Eternity
hero.description: Build a beautiful 3D palace for your photos, videos, and stories. Walk through your memories in an immersive virtual space — and share them with the people who matter most.

features.title: What makes it special
features.subtitle: More than storage. A living legacy.
features.palace3dDesc: Walk through a breathtaking virtual villa with wings for Family, Travel, Childhood, Career, and Creativity. Your memories displayed as art in an immersive 3D world.
features.aiInterviewsDesc: Our gentle AI interviewer guides you through your life story, asking the right questions to capture memories you might have forgotten. Like talking to a thoughtful friend.
features.cloudImportDesc: Connect Google Photos, Dropbox, OneDrive, or Box and let AI sort thousands of photos into the right rooms — automatically organized with smart titles and dates.
features.timeCapsuleDesc: Seal memories to be revealed on a future date. Leave a birthday message for your grandchild, or a letter to be opened in 2050. The future will thank you.
features.sharingDesc: Invite family members to contribute their own memories to shared rooms. Build your collective story together, across generations and continents.
features.legacyDesc: Designate heirs for your palace. Record video messages, write letters, and ensure your story lives on — preserved with care, for those who matter most.

howItWorks.title: Getting started
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up for free and choose your palace style. Tell us about the chapters of your life — we will create personalized wings and rooms.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Upload photos and videos, record stories, or import directly from Google Photos or Dropbox. AI helps organize everything beautifully.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Invite family to explore your palace, contribute their own memories, and experience your life story in immersive 3D.

preview.title: See it in action
preview.subtitle: A glimpse inside your palace
preview.description: Imagine walking through elegant rooms where every photo, video, and story has its place — beautifully displayed in 3D.
preview.exteriorDesc: Your palace, nestled in a serene landscape
preview.corridorDesc: Walk through themed wings of your life
preview.roomDesc: Memories displayed as art on the walls
preview.uploadDesc: Drag, drop, or import from cloud services

audience.title: Who it's for
audience.subtitle: Built for those who care about legacy
audience.keepersDesc: Individuals 60+ who want to organize a lifetime of memories into a visualized legacy for future generations.
audience.guardiansDesc: Parents and grandparents who want to ensure their stories, messages, and memories live on — no matter what.
audience.archivistsDesc: Anyone drowning in 50,000 photos across devices who wants AI-powered organization in a meaningful space.

testimonials.title: What people say
testimonials.subtitle: Stories from our community
testimonials.quote1: After my husband passed, I thought those memories would fade. Now I walk through our palace together with my grandchildren, and it feels like he is still here with us.
testimonials.quote2: I recorded messages for each of my children to receive on their wedding day. Knowing those words are safe, sealed, and waiting — that gives me real peace.
testimonials.quote3: My mother has dementia, but together we built her palace from old photo albums. On good days, walking through the rooms brings back stories I had never heard before.
testimonials.quote4: We imported 15,000 family photos from three decades. The AI sorted everything in under an hour. It would have taken me months.

cta.title: Ready to preserve your legacy?
cta.description: Start for free. No credit card required. Your memories are waiting for a home.

footer.about: We believe every life story deserves to be preserved with beauty and dignity. The Memory Palace transforms your photos, videos, and stories into an immersive 3D experience that your family can treasure forever.
footer.copyright: The Memory Palace. Preserve your memories for eternity.

walkthrough.phase0: Welcome to your Memory Palace, {name}. Click the entrance to step inside.
walkthrough.phase0Mobile: Welcome to your Memory Palace, {name}. Tap the entrance to step inside.
walkthrough.phase1: This grand hall connects five wings of your life — each one a gallery for a different chapter.
walkthrough.phase2Desktop: Use arrow keys or WASD to walk. Drag to look around. Walk to the {wingName} door and step through.
walkthrough.phase2Mobile: Use the joystick to walk. Swipe to look around. Walk to the {wingName} door and tap it.
walkthrough.phase3: Welcome to your {wingName} wing. Each door leads to a room. Walk to {roomName} and enter.
walkthrough.phase4: This is {roomName}. Let's bring it to life with your first memory.

discovery.title: Your Palace is Alive
discovery.subtitle: Here's what you can do next
discovery.massImportDesc: Bring in hundreds of photos at once
discovery.lifeInterviewsDesc: AI captures your stories through conversation
discovery.timeCapsuleDesc: Seal a room to open on a future date
discovery.shareFamilyDesc: Invite loved ones to view or contribute
discovery.tracksAchievementsDesc: Follow guided tracks and earn points

familyTree.title: Family Tree
familyTree.emptyDescription: Add family members and connect them with relationships to build your genealogy tree. You can also import an existing GEDCOM file.

pricing.title: The Memory Palace
pricing.headline: Simple, Honest Pricing
pricing.description: Start free. Upgrade when you need more space for your memories. All paid plans include a 14-day free trial.
pricing.faq1a: Absolutely. No lock-in, no penalties. Cancel from your account settings and keep access until the end of your billing period.
pricing.faq2q: What happens to my memories if I downgrade?
pricing.faq2a: Your memories are never deleted. You will just not be able to add new ones until you are within the free plan limits.
pricing.faq3a: Yes. All data is stored on EU-hosted infrastructure with encryption at rest and in transit. We are fully GDPR compliant.
pricing.faq4a: The Guardian plan includes family sharing, allowing up to 5 family members to contribute to your palace.
pricing.copyright: The Memory Palace. Preserve your memories for eternity.
pricing.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
pricing.couldNotConnect: Could not connect to payment service. Please try again.

cookieConsent.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze usage.
cookieConsent.essentialDesc: Required for authentication and core functionality.
cookieConsent.analyticsDesc: Help us understand usage patterns via PostHog (anonymized).

notificationPrompt.title: Stay connected to your memories
notificationPrompt.description: Get gentle reminders for "On This Day" anniversaries and time capsule reveals.

pwa.title: The Memory Palace
pwa.installMessage: Install as app on your phone
pwa.iosStep1: 1. Tap the Share button at the bottom
pwa.iosStep2: 2. Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"
pwa.androidStep2: 2. Tap "Install app" or "Add to Home Screen"

offlineBanner.message: You're offline — changes will sync when reconnected

offline.title: Your palace is resting…
offline.message: It seems you've wandered beyond the reach of the network.
offline.reassurance: Don't worry — your memories are safe and will sync when you reconnect.

invite.notFoundDesc: This invitation link may have expired or been removed.
invite.accessGranted: You now have access to {room} in {name}'s palace.
invite.wantsToShare: {name} wants to share memories with you

legacyView.linkNotFoundDesc: This legacy link is invalid or has already been used. If you believe this is an error, please contact the person who shared it with you.
legacyView.linkNotFoundAction: Learn more about The Memory Palace
legacyView.linkExpiredDesc: This legacy access link has expired. Access links are valid for 90 days after delivery.
legacyView.linkExpiredAction: Learn more about The Memory Palace
legacyView.greeting: Dear {contact}, {sender} wanted you to have these memories.
legacyView.introExplanation: The Memory Palace is a place where people preserve their most precious memories — photos, stories, and moments. {sender} chose to share theirs with you.
legacyView.noMemories: No memories were included in this delivery. If you believe this is an error, you can learn more at thememorypalace.ai.
legacyView.tagline: The Memory Palace — Preserving what matters most

interview.noWordsDetected: We didn't catch any words. You can type your answer below, or try recording again.
interview.encouragement1: Take your time. There are no wrong answers.
interview.encouragement2: This is your story, told in your own words.
interview.styleFactualDesc: Clear, straightforward, close to your words
interview.typeAnswerPlaceholder: Type your answer here... take your time.
interview.storyIntro: Here is a narrative woven from your answers. You can edit it before saving.
interview.leaveConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave? Your progress in this interview will be saved.
interview.storySaved: Your interview on "{title}" has been saved.
interview.giftMessage: These stories are a gift to everyone who comes after you.

legacyPanel.title: Your Legacy
legacyPanel.subtitle: Ensure your memories live on for those you love
legacyPanel.description: Your legacy contacts are people you trust to receive access to your Memory Palace. If your account becomes inactive, they will be able to visit the parts of your palace you have chosen to share with them.
legacyPanel.noContactsDesc: Add someone you trust to ensure your memories are preserved and passed on to those who matter most.

tracksPanel.title: Memory Building
tracksPanel.description: Complete tracks to earn Memory Points and build your legacy.
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.name: Preserve Your Memories
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.description: Upload and organize your existing memories into beautiful rooms.
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_first_photo.title: Upload your first photo
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_first_photo.desc: Add a photo memory to any room.
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_first_photo.hint: Enter a room and tap the + button to upload a photo.
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_10_photos.title: Upload 10 photos
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_10_photos.desc: Build a collection of 10 photo memories.
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_10_photos.hint: Keep adding photos to your rooms. You can use Mass Import for batches.
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_50_photos.title: Upload 50 photos
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_50_photos.desc: Reach 50 photo memories across your palace.
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_50_photos.hint: Use Mass Import to add photos in bulk.
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_100_photos.title: Upload 100 photos
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_100_photos.desc: A true archivist with 100 photos preserved.
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_100_photos.hint: Keep going! Your palace is growing beautifully.
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_first_video.title: Upload your first video
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_first_video.desc: Add a video memory to preserve moving moments.
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_first_video.hint: Create a new memory and choose the video type.
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_first_audio.title: Upload your first audio
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_first_audio.desc: Preserve a voice or sound as a memory.
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_first_audio.hint: Create a new memory and choose the audio type.
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_3_rooms.title: Fill 3 rooms with memories
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_3_rooms.desc: Spread your memories across at least 3 rooms.
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_3_rooms.hint: Visit different rooms in your wings and add memories to each.
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_mass_import.title: Use mass import
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_mass_import.hint: Use the Mass Import button to bring in many memories at once.
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_10_descriptions.title: Add descriptions to 10 memories
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_10_descriptions.desc: Give context to your memories with descriptions.
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_10_descriptions.hint: Edit your memories and add descriptions that tell the story.
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_5_locations.title: Add location data to 5 memories
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_5_locations.desc: Pin memories to places on the map.
tracksPanel.tracks.preserve.p_5_locations.hint: Edit memories and add location information.
tracksPanel.tracks.visualize.name: Visualize Your Palace
tracksPanel.tracks.visualize.description: Customize and curate your palace to make it uniquely yours.
tracksPanel.tracks.visualize.v_visit_5_wings.title: Visit all 5 wings
tracksPanel.tracks.visualize.v_visit_5_wings.desc: Explore every wing of your memory palace.
tracksPanel.tracks.visualize.v_visit_5_wings.hint: Click each wing from the exterior to visit them all.
tracksPanel.tracks.visualize.v_customize_wing.title: Customize a wing
tracksPanel.tracks.visualize.v_customize_wing.desc: Rename or change the icon of any wing.
tracksPanel.tracks.visualize.v_customize_wing.hint: Use the wing manager to personalize a wing's name or icon.
tracksPanel.tracks.visualize.v_change_layout.title: Change a room layout
tracksPanel.tracks.visualize.v_change_layout.desc: Try a different layout for one of your rooms.
tracksPanel.tracks.visualize.v_change_layout.hint: In a room, use the layout dropdown to change how it looks.
tracksPanel.tracks.visualize.v_create_room.title: Create a custom room
tracksPanel.tracks.visualize.v_create_room.desc: Add a brand new room to a wing.
tracksPanel.tracks.visualize.v_create_room.hint: Use the room manager in any corridor to add a new room.
tracksPanel.tracks.visualize.v_rename_3_rooms.title: Rename 3 rooms
tracksPanel.tracks.visualize.v_rename_3_rooms.desc: Make rooms your own by giving them personal names.

tutorial.tourTitle: Take a guided tour of your Memory Palace
tutorial.tutorial.steps.welcome.title: Welcome
tutorial.tutorial.steps.welcome.message: Welcome to your Memory Palace — a living home for your most treasured memories. Let me show you how everything works.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.navigation.title: Navigation Basics
tutorial.tutorial.steps.navigation.message: Use WASD or arrow keys to walk. Drag to look around. Click on doors and objects to interact. On mobile, use the joystick to move and swipe to look.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.entrance_hall.title: The Entrance Hall
tutorial.tutorial.steps.entrance_hall.message: This grand hall is the heart of your palace. Five doorways lead to the wings of your life — each one a gallery for a different chapter. Look for the wing names on each door.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.five_wings.title: The Five Wings
tutorial.tutorial.steps.five_wings.message: Family, Travel, Childhood, Career, and Creativity — each wing is a corridor lined with rooms. Walk through a door to explore.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.attic.title: Storage Room
tutorial.tutorial.steps.attic.message: There's also a special place called the Storage Room — a catch-all space for memories that don't fit neatly into a wing yet. We'll explore that more later.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.inside_wing.title: Inside a Wing
tutorial.tutorial.steps.inside_wing.message: Each wing corridor has doors to individual rooms. Paintings on the walls preview what's inside. The wing's name is displayed as a fresco at the far end.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.rooms_memories.title: Rooms & Memories
tutorial.tutorial.steps.rooms_memories.message: Inside each room, your memories are displayed as paintings, videos, albums, glowing orbs, and more. Click any memory to view it in detail.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.adding_memories.title: Adding Memories
tutorial.tutorial.steps.adding_memories.message: Use the + button to upload photos, videos, or documents. You can also drag and drop files, or use Mass Import to add many at once.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.sharing.title: Sharing
tutorial.tutorial.steps.sharing.message: Every room can be shared with loved ones. Use the Share button to invite family and friends to view or contribute their own memories.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.action_menu.title: The Action Menu
tutorial.tutorial.steps.action_menu.message: Look for the floating action button in the bottom-right corner. It gives you quick access to adding memories, managing rooms, and more features.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.life_interviews.title: Life Interviews
tutorial.tutorial.steps.life_interviews.message: Try our AI-guided Life Interviews — they help you capture stories through conversation, available from the action menu or the More menu on mobile.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.tracks_achievements.title: Tracks & Achievements
tutorial.tutorial.steps.tracks_achievements.messa: Complete Memory Building Tracks to earn points and unlock achievements. Check your progress in the status bar at the bottom.
tutorial.tutorial.steps.closing.title: Ready to Explore
tutorial.tutorial.steps.closing.message: You're all set! Walk through any door to begin. You can always retake this tour from the 'Take the Tour' button. Now go — your memories are waiting.

interviewLibrary.title: Life Interviews
interviewLibrary.subtitle: Guided conversations about your life story
interviewLibrary.familyTraditionsDesc: The rituals and routines that made your family unique — holidays, Sunday dinners, and the little things you want to pass on.
interviewLibrary.growingUpDesc: Your childhood home, your neighborhood, the world as you first knew it.
interviewLibrary.parentsGrandparentsDesc: The people who shaped you most — their stories, their lessons, your favorite moments together.
interviewLibrary.loveStoryDesc: How you met, how you knew, and what makes your love endure.
interviewLibrary.raisingChildrenDesc: The joys, the challenges, and the moments that made it all worth it.
interviewLibrary.greatestAdventureDesc: The trip that changed everything — where you went, what happened, and who you became.
interviewLibrary.placesOfHeartDesc: The places that call you back — and the stories of why they matter.
interviewLibrary.travelWisdomDesc: What journeys have taught you about yourself and the world.
interviewLibrary.earlyMemoriesDesc: Your earliest memories — the world as seen through a child's eyes.
interviewLibrary.schoolDaysDesc: Teachers who shaped you, friends who knew you, and the lessons beyond the classroom.
interviewLibrary.dreamsAndPlayDesc: What you dreamed of becoming, the games you played, and the imagination that shaped you.
interviewLibrary.lifesWorkDesc: What you built, what drove you, and what you're most proud of.
interviewLibrary.mentorsAndLessonsDesc: The people who guided you and the wisdom they shared.
interviewLibrary.turningPointsDesc: The moments that changed your professional path — and your life.
interviewLibrary.creativeSpiritDesc: The art you make, the passion that drives it, and how it all began.
interviewLibrary.inspirationDesc: The people, places, and feelings that spark your creative fire.
interviewLibrary.lifeWisdomDesc: The hard-won wisdom of a life fully lived.
interviewLibrary.legacyLetterDesc: What you want your grandchildren to know about you — in your own voice.
interviewLibrary.meaningOfItAllDesc: Reflecting on what has given your life its deepest meaning.

securityPage.heroDescription: We understand that your memories are irreplaceable. Here is exactly how we protect them — with transparency, care, and the highest standards.
securityPage.hostingVercelDetail: Your Memory Palace runs on Vercel, a world-class hosting platform with a global content delivery network (CDN). Every page loads fast, and every connection is automatically secured with HTTPS.
securityPage.hostingEuDetail: All your data is stored on Supabase PostgreSQL in Frankfurt, Germany — safely within the European Union. This means your memories are protected by strict EU data protection laws (GDPR).
securityPage.hostingGdprDetail: We follow the General Data Protection Regulation to the letter. Your personal data is processed lawfully and transparently, and only for the purposes you have agreed to.
securityPage.encryptionTransitDetail: Every connection between your device and our servers uses TLS 1.3, the latest and strongest transport encryption. Nobody can read your data as it travels over the internet.
securityPage.encryptionRestDetail: Your database is encrypted with AES-256, the same standard used by banks and governments. Even if someone accessed the physical servers, your data would be unreadable.
securityPage.encryptionFilesDetail: Your photos, videos, and documents are stored in Supabase Storage, which is also encrypted at rest. Files are only accessible through authenticated, time-limited links.
securityPage.encryptionPasswordDetail: Your password is never stored in plain text. It is hashed using bcrypt through Supabase Auth, making it practically impossible to reverse-engineer.
securityPage.authEmailDetail: Sign in securely with your email address and password. Your credentials are handled by Supabase Auth, a battle-tested authentication system.
securityPage.authSocialDetail: Prefer to sign in with Google or Apple? We support OAuth 2.0 social login — your password is never shared with us when you use these options.
securityPage.authMfaDetail: For extra peace of mind, you can enable two-factor authentication (2FA) using a TOTP app like Google Authenticator. This adds a second layer of protection to your account.
securityPage.authRlsDetail: Every database table is protected by Row Level Security (RLS). This means you can only ever access your own data — this is enforced at the database level, not just in our code.
securityPage.authJwtDetail: Your login sessions use JSON Web Tokens (JWT), which are short-lived and cryptographically signed. Sessions expire automatically, keeping your account safe even if you forget to log out.
securityPage.privacyExportDetail: You can download everything — all your memories, stories, and photos — as a JSON file with a ZIP of your media. Your data always belongs to you.
securityPage.privacyDeleteDetail: If you choose to delete your account, all your data is permanently removed. Deletion cascades through every table — nothing is left behind.
securityPage.privacyCookieDetail: We ask for your permission before setting any non-essential cookies. You can change your preferences at any time through our cookie consent controls.
securityPage.privacyNoTrackingLabel: No tracking, no ads, no data selling
securityPage.privacyNoTrackingDetail: We will never sell your data, show you advertisements, or track you across the web. Your memories are private, and that is a promise.
securityPage.privacyLegacyDetail: You can designate trusted family members as legacy contacts for digital inheritance. When the time comes, your memories can be passed on to the people you choose.
securityPage.backupDailyDetail: Your data is backed up automatically every day. In the unlikely event of a problem, we can restore your palace to its most recent state.
securityPage.backupPitrDetail: Our database supports point-in-time recovery, meaning we can restore data to any moment within the retention window — not just the last backup.
securityPage.backupReplicatedDetail: Files are stored with redundancy across multiple availability zones. Even if one data center has issues, your memories remain safe and accessible.
securityPage.commitmentTitle: Your memories are meant to last generations.
securityPage.commitmentBody: If you have questions about how we handle your data, or if you want to exercise any of your rights under GDPR, please contact us at
securityPage.ctaDescription: Your memories deserve a safe, beautiful home. Get started for free — no credit card required.
securityPage.footerCopyright: The Memory Palace. Preserve your memories for eternity.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.whoWeAreText1: The Memory Palace is operated from Belgium. We built this app to help you preserve and share your most precious memories — safely and privately. We are committed to protecting your personal data in full compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable Belgian and EU law.
privacy.whoWeAreText2: For any privacy-related questions, you can always reach us at:
privacy.whatWeCollectIntro: We only collect what we need to provide you with a great experience. Here is what we gather:
privacy.whatWeCollectItem1Text: your name, email address, and profile photo when you create an account.
privacy.whatWeCollectItem2Text: the photos, videos, stories, and other content you upload to your Memory Palace. This is the heart of the service.
privacy.whatWeCollectItem3Text: we collect anonymized data about how you use the app (such as which features are popular) to help us improve it. This data cannot be traced back to you personally.
privacy.whatWeCollectItem4Text: basic details like your browser type and screen size, so we can make the app look and work its best on your device.
privacy.howWeUseIntro: We use your data solely to provide and improve The Memory Palace. Specifically:
privacy.howWeUseItem1: To store, organize, and display your memories in your palace.
privacy.howWeUseItem2: To authenticate your account and keep it secure.
privacy.howWeUseItem3: To send you important service-related messages (such as email confirmations, security alerts, or legacy notifications).
privacy.howWeUseItem4: To improve the app based on anonymized usage patterns.
privacy.howWeUseNeverMid: use your data for advertising, and we will
privacy.whereStoredIntro: All your data is stored within the European Union:
privacy.whereStoredItem1Post: . Your memories, profile data, and account information all live here, encrypted at rest with AES-256.
privacy.whereStoredItem2Text: Vercel, with servers in the EU. All connections are encrypted with TLS 1.3.
privacy.whereStoredItem3Text: Supabase Storage (EU region), encrypted at rest. Your photos and media are only accessible through authenticated, time-limited links.
privacy.whereStoredOutro: Because everything is hosted in the EU, your data is fully protected by European data protection laws.
privacy.whoWeShareTitle: 5. Who We Share Your Data With
privacy.whoWeShareIntroPost: sell, rent, or trade your personal data. Period. We only share data with a small number of trusted service providers who help us run The Memory Palace:
privacy.whoWeShareItem1Text: — database hosting, file storage, and authentication.
privacy.whoWeShareItem3Text: — sending transactional emails (such as password resets and notifications).
privacy.whoWeShareItem4Text: — processing payments securely. We never see or store your credit card details.
privacy.whoWeShareOutro: All these providers are bound by data processing agreements and comply with GDPR. Beyond these providers, your data is only shared when:
privacy.whoWeShareCondition1Text: when you invite family members to view rooms or memories, the shared content becomes accessible to those people.
privacy.whoWeShareCondition2Text: we may disclose data if required by law or valid legal process.
privacy.yourRightsIntro: Under the GDPR (Articles 15-20 and beyond), you have strong rights over your personal data. Here is what you can do:
privacy.yourRightsItem1Text: request a complete copy of everything we hold about you.
privacy.yourRightsItem2Text: download all your memories, stories, and photos as a JSON file with a ZIP of your media — directly from your account settings.
privacy.yourRightsItem3Text: update or fix any information that is inaccurate or incomplete.
privacy.yourRightsItem4Text: request complete deletion of your account and all associated data. When you delete your account, everything is permanently removed.
privacy.yourRightsItem5Text: receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format that you can take to another service.
privacy.yourRightsItem6Text: opt out of analytics at any time through your cookie preferences.
privacy.yourRightsItem7Text: change your mind about analytics cookies or other optional processing at any time.
privacy.yourRightsOutroPre: To exercise any of these rights, email us at
privacy.yourRightsOutroPost: . We will respond within 30 days, as required by law.
privacy.retentionIntro: Your data is kept for as long as your account is active. You are in control:
privacy.retentionItem1Text: your memories and data stay safely stored for as long as you use The Memory Palace.
privacy.retentionItem2Text: when you delete your account, all personal data and uploaded content is permanently removed within 30 days. Backup copies are purged within 90 days.
privacy.retentionItem3Text: if you have set up legacy contacts, your memories will be delivered to your chosen family members according to your settings. This is entirely optional and under your control.
privacy.retentionItem4Text: aggregated, non-personal analytics data may be retained for up to 12 months after account deletion to help us improve the service.
privacy.cookiesIntro: We keep cookies to a minimum:
privacy.cookiesItem1Text: required for logging in and core functionality. These cannot be disabled, as the app would not work without them.
privacy.cookiesItem2Text: help us understand how people use the app so we can improve it. These are only set with your explicit consent, and you can change your preference at any time through the cookie consent banner.
privacy.cookiesOutroPost: use advertising cookies or trackers of any kind.
privacy.childrenText: The Memory Palace is designed for adults and is not intended for children under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from anyone under 16. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us and we will promptly remove it.
privacy.changesText: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. When we make significant changes, we will notify you by email or with a clear notice inside the app. Your continued use of The Memory Palace after any changes means you accept the updated policy.
privacy.contactIntro: If you have questions about this privacy policy, want to exercise your rights, or simply want to know more about how we protect your data, we would love to hear from you:
privacy.contactOutro: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Belgian Data Protection Authority (Gegevensbeschermingsautoriteit) if you believe your rights have been violated.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1P1: By creating an account or using The Memory Palace ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use the Service.
terms.section1P2: The Service is operated by Memory Palace, a company based in Belgium. These Terms are governed by Belgian law and the laws of the European Union.
terms.section2P1: To use the Service, you must:
terms.section2Li1: Be at least 16 years of age.
terms.section2Li2: Provide accurate and complete registration information.
terms.section2Li3: Keep your login credentials secure and confidential.
terms.section2Li4: Notify us immediately at {email} if you suspect unauthorized access to your account.
terms.section2P2: You are responsible for all activity that occurs under your account. We are not liable for losses arising from unauthorized use of your account.
terms.section3P1: You agree not to use the Service to:
terms.section3Li1: Upload, store, or share content that is illegal, abusive, defamatory, or infringes on the rights of others.
terms.section3Li2: Distribute malware, viruses, or any harmful code through the platform.
terms.section3Li3: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to other users' accounts, data, or any part of our infrastructure.
terms.section3Li4: Use automated tools (bots, scrapers) to access the Service without our written permission.
terms.section3Li5: Use the Service for commercial purposes without our prior consent.
terms.section3P2: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms without prior notice.
terms.section4P1: You retain full ownership of all content you upload to The Memory Palace, including photos, videos, text, and audio recordings ("Your Content").
terms.section4P2: By uploading content, you grant us a limited, non-exclusive license to store, process, and display Your Content solely for the purpose of providing the Service to you and any users you explicitly share it with.
terms.section4P3: We do not claim any ownership over Your Content. We will not use Your Content for advertising, training AI models, or any purpose other than delivering the Service.
terms.section5P1: We strive to keep The Memory Palace available at all times, but we do not guarantee uninterrupted access. The Service may be temporarily unavailable due to maintenance, updates, or circumstances beyond our control.
terms.section5P2: We may modify, suspend, or discontinue features of the Service at any time. In the event of a permanent shutdown, we will provide at least 90 days' notice and a way to export your data.
terms.section6P1: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Memory Palace and its officers, employees, and affiliates shall not be liable for:
terms.section6Li1: Any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages.
terms.section6Li2: Loss of data, profits, or goodwill arising from your use of the Service.
